title: Aehr Test Systems Reports Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Financial Results
text: Aehr Test Systems reported fiscal 2026 Q2 results with continued momentum in AI and data center markets. Net revenue totaled $9.9 million versus $13.5 million in the prior-year quarter. GAAP net loss reached $3.2 million, or $0.11 per diluted share, compared to a $1.0 million loss previously. Non-GAAP net loss was $1.3 million, or $0.04 per share. Bookings reached $6.2 million with a backlog of $11.8 million as of November 28, 2025. Total liquidity stood at $31.0 million, up from $24.7 million in the prior quarter. CEO Gayn Erickson stated: We believe our bookings in the second half of this fiscal year will be between $60 million and $80 million. The company guided for second-half fiscal 2026 revenue between $25 million and $30 million, with non-GAAP net loss per share projected between negative $0.09 and negative $0.05. Growth drivers centered on AI processor testing, packaged-part burn-in systems for high-performance computing, and emerging silicon photonics applications serving data center markets.
